name: Compare suing lawyer vs. Google for AI Overview mess in Phoenix?
description: Lawyer easier win; Google TOS blocks.[7]

mainEntity.name: Compare suing lawyer vs. Google for AI Overview mess in Phoenix?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lawyer easier win; Google TOS blocks.[7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Sue lawyer easier—direct duty, precedents; Google protected by TOS/immunity harder.[7] Factors: Google's Section 230 shield. Lawyer suit faster recovery.
